SPOBAG AG ( (DE:LEOW) ) just unveiled an update.

Leo International Precision Health Aktiengesellschaft announced a correction to a previous manager’s transaction notification. The correction pertains to the transaction date, which was initially misstated in the announcement from June 4, 2025. This update clarifies the acquisition details, including the transaction’s financial specifics and its occurrence outside a trading venue, potentially impacting stakeholders’ understanding of the company’s financial activities.

More about SPOBAG AG

Leo International Precision Health Aktiengesellschaft operates in the precision health industry, focusing on the development and distribution of health-related products and services. The company is based in Planegg / Martinsried, Germany, and its shares are traded on regulated markets in Dusseldorf and Frankfurt.

data.title: Manganese X Energy Launches Battery Hill Prefeasibility Study
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Manganese X Energy Corp ( (TSE:MN) ) has issued an announcement.

Manganese X Energy Corp. has initiated a prefeasibility study for its Battery Hill High Purity Manganese project, selecting ABH Engineering Inc. and GEMTEC Consulting Engineering and Scientists Ltd. to lead the study. This move marks a significant milestone for the company as it aims to optimize project economics and environmental stewardship, advancing Battery Hill towards becoming a key production hub for the EV and energy-storage sectors in North America. The study will incorporate recent advancements and is expected to enhance the project’s readiness for production, potentially impacting the North American supply chain for high purity manganese.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MN is a Neutral.

Manganese X Energy Corp faces major financial hurdles with no revenue and negative cash flows. While recent investments and project advancements offer potential future benefits, current technical indicators show mixed signals, and valuation concerns persist due to financial instability.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MN stock, click here.

More about Manganese X Energy Corp

Manganese X Energy Corp. is focused on advancing its Battery Hill project to become the first publicly traded manganese mining company in Canada and the U.S. to commercialize high purity manganese for electric vehicles. The company aims to supply value-added materials to the lithium-ion battery and alternative energy industries, while developing carbon-friendly and cost-effective processing methodologies.

Average Trading Volume: 202,860

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$23.61M

See more data about MN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Copel Reports Strong Q3 2025 Financial Performance
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd ( (ELP) ) has provided an announcement.

In the third quarter of 2025, Copel reported a 7.8% increase in recurring EBITDA, amounting to R$ 1,337.4 million, compared to the same period in 2024. This growth reflects the company’s robust asset management and effective operational strategy, with significant contributions from its generation and transmission segments. The company’s net operating revenue also rose by 18.7% to R$ 6,810.5 million, driven by increased electricity supply revenue and sectorial financial assets. These results underscore Copel’s strong market positioning and operational efficiency, benefiting stakeholders through enhanced financial performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (ELP) stock is a Buy with a $12.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd stock, see the ELP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ELP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELP is a Outperform.

Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd exhibits strong financial and operational performance, supported by robust technical indicators. However, concerns about increasing leverage, negative free cash flow, and challenges in generation curtailment slightly temper the overall outlook. The attractive dividend yield provides a cushion, but the valuation is not particularly compelling.

To see Spark’s full report on ELP stock, click here.

More about Companhia Paranaense de Energia Pfd

Companhia Paranaense de Energia, also known as Copel, is an energy company based in Paraná, Brazil. It operates in the generation, transmission, distribution, and commercialization of electricity, focusing on providing energy solutions across various segments.

Cresud Sociedad ( (CRESY) ) has shared an announcement.

Between November 17 and 25, 2025, Cresud Sociedad Anónima saw the exercise of certain warrants by holders, resulting in the issuance of 16,898,282 ordinary shares and the collection of USD 6,199,980. This exercise increased the company’s capital stock from 631,844,155 to 648,742,437 shares, while reducing the number of outstanding warrants from 60,669,566 to 49,708,631. This development signifies a strengthening of Cresud’s capital base, potentially enhancing its financial flexibility and market position.

The most recent analyst rating on (CRESY) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cresud Sociedad stock, see the CRESY Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Selkirk Copper Mines Strengthens Leadership with Key Indigenous Appointments
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Venerable Ventures ( (TSE:SCMI) ) has shared an update.

Selkirk Copper Mines Inc. has appointed Kevin McGinty and Morris Morrison, both Selkirk First Nation citizens, to key leadership roles as Vice President, Lands and Environment, and Manager, Community Relations, respectively. These appointments are part of Selkirk Copper’s strategy to integrate Selkirk First Nation’s land stewardship values and community priorities into the Minto Mine restart, aiming to set a new standard for Indigenous-led resource development in Canada. The involvement of McGinty and Morrison is expected to ensure that the company’s operations align with the environmental and community values of the Selkirk First Nation, fostering long-term benefits for the community and stakeholders.

More about Venerable Ventures

Selkirk Copper Mines Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and development of copper, gold, and silver resources. The company is particularly involved in the Minto Mine project, emphasizing sustainable and environmentally responsible resource development, with a strong focus on engaging and incorporating the values and priorities of the Selkirk First Nation community.

Average Trading Volume: 273,162

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$48.87M

data.title: VIP Play Amends Credit Line with Excel Partners
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

VIP Play ( (VIPZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

VIP Play, Inc. entered into a First Amended and Restated Discretionary Convertible Revolving Line Of Credit Demand Note with Excel Family Partners, LLLP on March 31, 2025, for a principal amount of up to $14 million. This agreement allows Excel, controlled by VIP Play’s board member Bruce Cassidy, to provide loans at its discretion, with a fixed annual interest rate of 12%. The outstanding principal balance as of December 3, 2025, was $20,665,313. The agreement includes provisions for conversion of debt into common stock, reflecting strategic financial maneuvers to potentially strengthen VIP Play’s capital structure.

More about VIP Play

VIP Play, Inc. is a Nevada-based company operating in the financial sector, focusing on providing credit solutions. The company engages in financial agreements and partnerships to enhance its market position.

Onyx Gold Corp. ( (TSE:ONYX) ) has shared an announcement.

Onyx Gold Corp. has announced the discovery of a new gold zone 250 meters southwest of the Argus North Zone, part of its Munro-Croesus Project. This discovery, resulting from their extensive drilling program, highlights the potential for expanded gold mineralization along the Argus Fault, enhancing the project’s prospects and indicating significant growth potential for the company.
